message:
feat(e2e): CI smoke test module (bd-1w6k.8.2)

Adds ci_smoke module with run_ci_smoke() function that:
- Runs in-memory differential comparison (11 SQL ops)
- Verifies on-disk oplog integrity via C SQLite
- Returns structured CiSmokeResult with pass/fail, match counts, hash check

Uses literal UPDATEs to stay within FrankenSQLite's current expression support.
6 tests covering correctness, performance, serialization, determinism.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
